title: What the Hell is Everyone Else at Khara Thinking
display_title: What the Hell is Everyone Else at Khara Thinking
wikitext:
[]: What the Hell is Everyone Else at Khara Thinking? Post by Sun Stealer » Fri Aug 13, 2010 11:34 pm What do we know about what is going on over at Studio Khara? Specifically, do we know what the reaction is among the veteran staff, like Sadamoto for instance? Are they as bewildered by Anno's descent into madness as we are, or has everybody hopped on the crazy train express to trainwreck station?

[]: Re: What the Hell is Anno Thinking? Post by Eva 04 » Fri Aug 13, 2010 11:40 pm Sun Stealer wrote: What do we know about what is going on over at Studio Khara? Specifically, do we know what the reaction is among the veteran staff, like Sadamoto for instance? Are they as bewildered by Anno's descent into madness as we are, or has everybody hopped on the crazy train express to trainwreck station?

[]: Re: What the Hell is Anno Thinking? Post by Sun Stealer » Fri Aug 13, 2010 11:55 pm Eva 04 wrote: How about first,you telling us what the hell your talking about.

[]: Post by Nonoriri » Sat Aug 14, 2010 12:13 am Everyone agrees silently as they are making massive amounts of money.

[]: Re: What the Hell is Anno Thinking? Post by ZapX » Sat Aug 14, 2010 12:15 am Sun Stealer wrote: it's all baseless speculation.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 14, 2010 12:20 am You're not thinking about this , are you? Besides that, I haven't heard ANY source or information where somebody at Kara (pretty much they're all from Gainax Anno included, except for a few new staff members) that says they're upset with where the new movies are going. With the Newtype articles from around the time of 1.0, the staff was actually excited and interested in where the films were going to go, not that they knew much of anything (plots for the next 3 films, character, etc) at the time: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2053 , http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2364 , http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2536 .

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Aug 14, 2010 12:40 am Well there was this interview with Sadamoto (but, the link is apparently dead for real), where he was all over the place about how awesome 2.0 is. The only other instance of a staff member giving their opinions was in an interview with Kazuya Tsurumaki published in CUT magazine, where he half jokingly said that he left a note to Anno about Q: "If it won't contain decent amounts of Asuka, i'll be mean". I'm sure that this made Anno break down and cry. I found this interview snippet on the Min Nano EvaFan blog sometimes last August, i think, but i'm too lazy to dig it up now.

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Aug 14, 2010 12:58 am how about this? Rebuild takes what EVA did and pretty much amps it all up to have them be more "in your face" 1.0, due it being based on the more quiet passages of episodes 1-6 didn't really need to amp up things a whole lot 2.0, being based in the "Action" section of the series, really pushes the overtly goofy aspects of the action section into hyperdrive so with Q and Final...if we go by that logic, the dramatic/mindfuck stuff will be dialed up to 11, along with the promised "more upbeat ending" thrown in for extra measure those are my thoughts on the matter

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 14, 2010 12:58 am SaltyJoe : Wow, that site with the Sadamoto interview really is dead. Not even Wayback Machine works for it. Also, was that Tsurumaki interview mentioned in Min Nano EvaFan blog translated or something you just google-translated?

[]: Post by BeoX2 » Sat Aug 14, 2010 1:04 am There have only been 2 Rebuild films made so far. Save your bitching for when they're all made. The direction they're taking right now is DIFFERENT, not necessarily worse.

[]: Post by ZapX » Sat Aug 14, 2010 1:08 am Ok, I'm locking this.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 14, 2010 11:27 am In after lock: I don't know what you're getting at Sun Stealer, I thought both 1.0 and 2.0 were awesome.
